name: Queen Bee - Game Version
description:
The Stage 2 Boss Battle from Echidna Wars DX. My second attempt at this character, it is more accurate to the game, and plays more like a game. You have unlimited lives, so lose as much as you want ;) you just respawn.

I also made it anypov after getting that feedback.

Contains Vore and Transformation.

Update 1 - removed about 400 tokens from personality and cleaned it up. I intend to trim more and add the Grubs/worms.

Bee, Insect, Monster Girl, combat, enemies, bees, vore, transform, consume, game, rpg, battle, enemy
creator: stjim
